title: Marketing / Brand Manager
description: Develop and execute marketing strategies — brand positioning, digital campaigns, market research, and product launches. Work across FMCG, financial services, tech, and retail.

employability.demand: High — every commercial organisation needs marketing capability.
employability.outlook: Growing; digital marketing and data-driven campaigns expanding the field.
pathways: BCom Marketing / BCom Business Management (3–4 years)
CIM certification
Corporates, agencies, FMCG companies, startups

title: Supply Chain / Logistics Manager
description: Plan and oversee the flow of goods from source to consumer — procurement, warehousing, transport, customs, and inventory. Critical in FMCG, retail, manufacturing, and e-commerce.

employability.demand: High — port congestion and import complexity drive demand for specialists.
employability.outlook: Strong; e-commerce and regional trade corridors expanding logistics needs.
pathways: BCom Logistics / Supply Chain Management (3–4 years)
CIPS / SAPICS certification
FMCG companies, retailers, freight forwarders, 3PLs

title: Hospitality / Hotel Manager
description: Lead the operations of a hotel, lodge, or hospitality establishment — front office, food and beverage, housekeeping, events, and revenue management. Build guest experience and drive profitability.

employability.demand: Moderate — tourism recovery post-COVID rebuilding demand; seasonal variability.
employability.outlook: Growing; SA tourism sector targeting R400bn by 2030.
pathways: BCom Hospitality Management / BTech Hospitality (3–4 years)
Hotel school diplomas
Hotel chains, game lodges, resorts, cruise lines

title: Tourism / Travel Manager
description: Develop and manage tourism products — tour packages, destination marketing, travel itineraries, and eco-tourism offerings. Work with operators, conservation bodies, and government boards.

employability.demand: Moderate — growing as inbound tourism expands; linked to broader economic cycles.
employability.outlook: Growing; SA National Tourism Sector Strategy prioritises job creation.
pathways: BCom Tourism Management / BA Tourism (3–4 years)
Tour operators, SA Tourism, game reserves, travel agencies

title: Human Resources Manager
description: Recruit, develop, and retain employees — managing performance, compensation, labour relations, and transformation. HR is a strategic business partner in every large organisation.

employability.demand: High — every organisation above ~50 people needs dedicated HR support.
employability.outlook: Stable; labour-law complexity and transformation requirements keeping demand high.
pathways: BCom Human Resources / Industrial Psychology (3–4 years)
SABPP membership
Corporates, government, consulting, staffing agencies

title: Retail / Store Operations Manager
description: Run a retail store or cluster of branches — managing stock, staff, sales targets, shrinkage, and customer experience. A fast-paced role with clear progression from floor staff to regional manager.

employability.demand: High — retail is one of SA's largest employment sectors.
employability.outlook: Stable; e-commerce disruption offset by growth in township retail.
pathways: BCom Retail Management / Business Management (3–4 years)
Internal management trainee programmes
Pick n Pay, Shoprite, Woolworths, Spar, Mr Price

title: Event Manager / Conference Coordinator
description: Plan and deliver events — corporate conferences, product launches, sports events, festivals, and private functions. Coordinate venues, suppliers, budgets, logistics, and marketing.

employability.demand: Moderate — recovery post-COVID has rebounded strongly; MICE sector growing.
employability.outlook: Growing; SA's position as an international meetings destination expanding opportunities.
pathways: Diploma / BCom Event Management / Hospitality (3–4 years)
Event companies, hotels, PCOs, corporates, sports bodies

title: Property / Real Estate Agent
description: Market, sell, and lease residential and commercial property — advising buyers and sellers, conducting valuations, and managing portfolios. Commission-based; high earners in strong markets.

employability.demand: Moderate — tied to property market cycles; Proptech creating new channels.
employability.outlook: Stable; affordable housing and township property markets providing growth pockets.
pathways: NQF4 Real Estate qualification (required by PPRA)
Agency apprenticeship
Estate agencies, property developers, corporate property
